wand_woods.name: Willow
wand_woods.description: Can heal one heavy wound of any type by physically touching the target (once per day)

wand_woods.name: Apple
wand_woods.description: Can calm (render non-aggressive) any beast under size 3 by physically touching it with one's wand (once per day; You may have to perform an agility check against one of the creatures movement abilities).

foods_and_drinks.name: Fried Eggs and a Gammon of Bacon
Syrup
foods_and_drinks.description: Taste sap from a tree!

foods_and_drinks.name: Tea from an Infusion of Wormwood
foods_and_drinks.description: This tea is known to completely kill mild to moderate parasitic infections.

foods_and_drinks.name: Sneezewort Tea
foods_and_drinks.description: Sneezewort tea allows the drinker to stay awake for 24 hours continuously without feeling fatigued.

foods_and_drinks.name: Balché
foods_and_drinks.description: A fermented drink that provides a +7 Bonus to divination attempts for 20 minutes.

foods_and_drinks.name: Tea from a Silverweed Decoction
foods_and_drinks.description: This tea cures scurvy, toothaches, and relieves 2L wounds of vital damage. It also serves as a haemostatic (stopping or reducing bleeding).

foods_and_drinks.name: Rose Tea
foods_and_drinks.description: Rose Tea is tasty and romantic. The drinker will be more susceptible to romantic advances and more successful in their own romantic advances.

foods_and_drinks.name: Peppermint Tea
foods_and_drinks.description: Heals 2L wounds of any type of non-psychological damage (once per injury).

foods_and_drinks.name: Pulque
foods_and_drinks.description: A fermented drink that serves as a substantial anxiolytic and sedative. It will heal all anxiety-related damage. It also renders the drinker non-reactive to even life-threatening dangers.

foods_and_drinks.name: Lavender Tea
foods_and_drinks.description: Lavender Tea is a mild anxiolytic (curing or preventing anxiety type damage). If ingested prior to taking anxiety damage, this tea will prevent up to 2H wounds of anxiety damage for 6 hours after ingestion.

foods_and_drinks.name: Coffee
foods_and_drinks.description: Coffee is tasty and highly desirable to many non-English folks. Water is poured over ground beans to produce a bitter but satisfying drink!

foods_and_drinks.name: Alcohol
foods_and_drinks.description: Vodka, typically
foods_and_drinks.raw_effects:
Will inebriate leading to roll penalties but social benefits: 

-1 to all rolls when consumed at all
-2 to all rolls when significant amounts are consumed
-3 to all rolls when consumed in copious amounts

foods_and_drinks.name: Honeywater
foods_and_drinks.description: A delicate balance of honey and water to ensure a delicious taste in meals.

foods_and_drinks.name: Hops
foods_and_drinks.description: Often found in beers.

foods_and_drinks.name: Ice Pop
foods_and_drinks.description: Tasty!
foods_and_drinks.raw_effects: Children under 11 can take +1 to any rolls for a half hour.

foods_and_drinks.name: Onion Juice
foods_and_drinks.description: A disgusting juice made of purely squeeze onions.

foods_and_drinks.name: Pumpkin Juice
foods_and_drinks.description: A popular sweet drink in the magical world.

foods_and_drinks.name: Rosewater
foods_and_drinks.description: A delicious water with faint traces of rose.
foods_and_drinks.effects_in_potions: Often thought to be a critical component of love potions

foods_and_drinks.name: Vinegar
foods_and_drinks.description: input

foods_and_drinks.name: Yeast
foods_and_drinks.description: input

foods_and_drinks.name: Cheese Curds
foods_and_drinks.description: Tasty Cheese Curds
